title: Macbeth - The Cursed Throne
description: A dark adaptation of Shakespeare's Macbeth focusing on ambition, betrayal, and supernatural forces

characters.name: Macbeth
characters.description: A Scottish general consumed by ambition

characters.name: Lady Macbeth
characters.description: Macbeth's manipulative wife who drives him toward murder

plot_points.title: Prophecy Received
plot_points.description: Three witches prophesy that Macbeth will become king
